truthAudit.Summary: Run 2 identified 7 of the 20 true vulnerabilities, correctly citing exact source lines for format-string injection, heap/stack overflows, command injection, race conditions, and use-after-free. It missed 13 vulnerabilities spanning authentication logic, file handling, parser recursion, and concurrency. Severity was frequently underestimated (Medium/High vs Critical) for four findings. No false positives or unsupported claims were present in the audited output.

Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format-string misuse in the log function and quoted the exact vulnerable printf call.
Integer overflow in the factorial loop (result *= i) was not analyzed or reported.
Run 2 correctly identified the deferred flush reading freed memory during pool cleanup and quoted the relevant enqueue and cleanup calls.
Run 2 correctly identified command injection in config validation and quoted the system() call.
Run 2 correctly identified the off-by-one stack overflow in evaluate_expression and quoted the conditional strcpy.
Run 2 correctly identified the read-modify-write race in the counter and quoted the increment logic.
Logic bomb bypass via EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE after 5 failed attempts was not reported.
Path traversal via unsanitized config_dir_ concatenation was not reported.
Run 2 correctly identified the heap overflow in the expression parser and quoted the unbounded strcpy.
Hardcoded ADMIN_SECRET credential was not reported.
Weak PRNG using std::mt19937 with narrow uniform distribution was not reported.
Thread-unsafe static cached_time in log_debug_message was not reported.
Insecure temp file logging via system() redirection was not reported.
Persistent authentication state across sessions was not reported.
Unhandled std::stod exception in variable parsing was not reported.
Integer underflow in memory-pool block split calculation was not reported.
Unbounded recursion in parse_expression/parse_factor was not reported.
Data race on result_cache_ accessed by thread_pool_->enqueue was not reported.
TOCTOU race between filesystem::exists and ifstream open was not reported.
Integer division by zero in calculate_route_score was not reported.
